doing: Executing worker phase 3: design report artifact format and draft sample report.
accomplished: Reviewed phase 3 requirements and defined bounded fields for worker reports
Designed JSON schema with strict type checks and required fields
Generated this sample report as a concrete example
findings: Schema separation from run ledger improves auditability and traceability
Bounded fields prevent runaway metadata and keep reports concise
Artifacts array with (label, path, kind) triples provides useful indexing
ISO 8601 timestamps enable programmatic sorting and lifecycle analysis
FilesTouched supports change-impact analysis across runs
nextSteps: Validate schema against sample using a JSON validator (ajv, jsonschema)
Review schema with team and iterate if needed
Implement writer in worker code to emit reports at phase boundaries
Add report archival/rotation strategy to coordinator
risks: Schema additionalProperties=false is strict; if new fields are needed later, a bump to v2 will be required
No explicit version field in report — consider adding 'schemaVersion'
FilesTouched path resolution may need normalization across platforms
headline: Phase 3 report artifact schema complete
